Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $124,481,226Details
International Box Office $315,700,000
Worldwide Box Office $440,181,226
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,708,934
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,931,421
Total $8,640,355
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When an ancient power is unleashed, Aquaman must forge an uneasy alliance with an unlikely ally to protect Atlantis, and the world, from irreversible devastation.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,686,211 (22.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.50 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$205,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,706 opening theaters/3,787 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $134,370,229

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
December 22nd, 2023 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: December 20th, 2023 (Wide), released as Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom (水行俠 失落王國) (Taiwan)
December 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Finland)
December 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Philippines)
December 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
December 20th, 2023 (Wide), released as Aquaman y el reino perdido (Chile)
Video Release: January 23rd, 2024 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi violence and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2803 (cert #54649), 10/4/2023)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Franchise: DC Extended Universe, Aquaman
Filming location (city or town): Malibu, CA
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom, United States
Filming location (state or county): California, United States, Hawai'i, HI
Plot point: Royalty, Underwater
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure

Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

When an ancient power is unleashed, Aquaman must forge an uneasy alliance with an unlikely ally to protect Atlantis, and the world, from irreversible devastation.
